description: You are a Machine Learning Engineer preparing a continuous-control Reinforcement Learning (RL) task in Webots. Configure the simulation to interface with an external Python RL wrapper by setting the WorldInfo basicTimeStep to 16 and randomSeed to 42. Configure the 'DEF AGENT' robot node for external control by setting its controller to "<extern>" and its supervisor field to TRUE. Assign the DEF name 'RL_TARGET' to the Solid node containing the red Sphere geometry. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/rl_env_ready.wbt.
